item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 102 pts (0.453) New York Rangers – 71 pts (0.311) Tampa Bay Lightning – 100 pts (0.444) Buffalo Sabres – 100 pts (0.439) Montreal Canadiens – 98 pts (0.436) Boston Bruins – 94 pts (0.412) Pittsburgh Penguins – 92 pts (0.404) New York Islanders – 89 pts (0.385) Ottawa Senators – 88 pts (0.391) Detroit Red Wings – 88 pts (0.391) Columbus Blue Jackets – 88 pts (0.386) Philadelphia Flyers – 88 pts (0.386) Washington Capitals – 85 pts (0.373) New Jersey Devils – 80 pts (0.356) Florida Panthers – 77 pts (0.342) Toronto Maple Leafs – 77 pts (0.338) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
